'''''Episode I Adventures 9: Rescue in the Core''''' was the ninth installment of ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] is in trouble. He is clumsy, and he just caused a big accident. He is being taken to the [[Quarry penal colony|Quarry]], a spooky fortress that few prisoners have survived. Along the way, the bongo carrying Jar Jar is attacked.''

''Can Jar Jar save himself…''and'' save the day?''
